scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e
scripts.coverage:all: npm run coverage:unit && npm run coverage:integration && npm run coverage:e2e
scripts.dev:auth: npm run build -w @app/common && npm run dev -w @app/auth-service
scripts.dev:project: npm run build -w @app/common && npm run dev -w @app/project-service
scripts.dev:task: npm run build -w @app/common && npm run dev -w @app/task-service
scripts.dev:notification: npm run build -w @app/common && npm run dev -w @app/notification-service
scripts.dev:all: npm run build -w @app/common && concurrently -n gateway,auth,project,task,notification "npm run dev -w @app/gateway" "npm run dev -w @app/auth-service" "npm run dev -w @app/project-service" "npm run dev -w @app/task-service" "npm run dev -w @app/notification-service"
scripts.build:auth: npm run build -w @app/common && npm run build -w @app/auth-service
scripts.build:project: npm run build -w @app/common && npm run build -w @app/project-service
scripts.build:task: npm run build -w @app/common && npm run build -w @app/task-service
scripts.build:notification: npm run build -w @app/common && npm run build -w @app/notification-service
scripts.dev:infra: docker compose up -d db redis mailpit
